category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Dominican Republic EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入多米尼加共和国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入多明尼加共和國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Dominican Republic INDOCAL conformity context, SIE and distributor grid coordination, 120/240 V 60 Hz electrical input expectations, Americas-market J1772 / CCS1 connector assumptions that must be confirmed project by project, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 61851-23 DC charging, IEC 61000 EMC, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与多米尼加共和国INDOCAL合格评定背景、SIE及配电公司并网协调、120/240 V 60 Hz电气输入预期、须逐项目确认的美洲市场J1772 / CCS1接口假设、IEC 61851安全、IEC 61851-23直流充电、IEC 61000电磁兼容，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與多明尼加共和國INDOCAL合格評定背景、SIE及配電公司併網協調、120/240 V 60 Hz電氣輸入預期、須逐項目確認的美洲市場J1772 / CCS1接口假設、IEC 61851安全、IEC 61851-23直流充電、IEC 61000電磁相容，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering the Dominican Republic, the practical gaps are 120/240 V, 60 Hz grid input and distributor coordination; INDOCAL conformity and NORDOM / IEC evidence where applicable; SIE and EDENORTE / EDESUR / EDEESTE project coordination for grid-connected installations; connector hardware conversion away from GB/T 20234 to the locally required connector. Because the Dominican Republic is an Americas-style 60 Hz market, J1772 Type 1 AC and CCS1 DC are likely practical expectations, but exporters should confirm the required connector with SIE, the distributor, site owner, or charge-point operator before quoting. GB/T connectors are physically incompatible and GB/T 27930 DC communication is not a substitute for CCS communication or network OCPP requirements.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入多米尼加共和国时，实务差距包括：120/240 V、60 Hz电网输入及配电公司协调；适用时的INDOCAL合格评定及NORDOM / IEC证据；并网安装需与SIE及EDENORTE / EDESUR / EDEESTE进行项目协调；接口硬件须从GB/T 20234改为当地项目要求的接口。由于多米尼加共和国属于美洲式60 Hz市场，J1772 Type 1交流和CCS1直流是较可能的实务预期，但出口商应在报价前向SIE、配电公司、场地方或充电点运营商确认接口要求。GB/T接口在物理上不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通信也不能替代CCS通信或联网OCPP要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入多明尼加共和國時，實務差距包括：120/240 V、60 Hz電網輸入及配電公司協調；適用時的INDOCAL合格評定及NORDOM / IEC證據；併網安裝需與SIE及EDENORTE / EDESUR / EDEESTE進行項目協調；接口硬體須從GB/T 20234改為當地項目要求的接口。由於多明尼加共和國屬於美洲式60 Hz市場，J1772 Type 1交流和CCS1直流是較可能的實務預期，但出口商應在報價前向SIE、配電公司、場地方或充電點運營商確認接口要求。GB/T接口在物理上不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通訊也不能替代CCS通訊或聯網OCPP要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INDOCAL scope determination, SIE approval, distributor interconnection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Dominican Republic conformity assessment rules, SIE and distributor requirements, IEC standard editions, connector requirements, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INDOCAL适用范围裁定、SIE批准、配电公司并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行多米尼加共和国合格评定规则、SIE及配电公司要求、IEC标准版本、接口要求及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INDOCAL適用範圍裁定、SIE批准、配電公司併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行多明尼加共和國合格評定規則、SIE及配電公司要求、IEC標準版本、接口要求及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
